steps.title: Combine the repeated group
steps.content:
Both terms on the left contain $x+6$, so factor that group:
$$
(\frac{1}{3}-\frac{1}{2})(x+6)=-8
$$

steps.title: Solve the equation
steps.content: Multiply both sides by $-6$: $$ x+6=48 $$ Subtract $6$ from both sides: $$ x=42 $$ The answer is 42.
